# terrible_community_general_django_check (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `apps` (String) Restrict checks to specific applications. Default is to check all applications.
- `databases` (String) Specify databases to run checks against. If not specified, Django does not run database tests. The parameter has been renamed to `databases` in community.general 11.3.0. The old name is still available as an alias.
- `deploy` (Boolean) Include additional checks relevant in a deployment setting.
- `fail_level` (String) Message level that triggers failure. Default is the Django default value. Check the documentation for the version being used.
- `tags` (String) Restrict checks to specific tags.

### Read-Only

- `run_info` (String) Command-line execution information.
- `version` (String) Version of Django.
